steps.title: Subtract 180 from both sides
steps.content:
Starting with $5p + 180 = 250$, subtract 180 from both sides:
$$5p = 250 - 180 = 70$$

steps.title: Use the source rationale
steps.content: Choice A is correct. Subtracting $180$ from both sides of the given equation yields $5p=70$. Dividing both sides of this equation by $5$ yields $p=14$. Therefore, the value of $p$ that satisfies the equation $5p+180=250$ is $14$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice B is incorrect. This value of $p$ satisfies the equation $5p+180=505$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice C is incorrect. This value of $p$ satisfies the equation $5p+180=610$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice D is incorrect. This value of $p$ satisfies the equation $5p+180=1,430$.
